purpose: Limit mandatory evidence completion to the most recent two relevant seasons per competition. Older evidence is retained if already present but is not a completion blocker.

global_policy.calendar_year_policy: current calendar season plus immediately previous calendar season
global_policy.cross_year_policy: two most recently completed seasons until the new target season has completed matches; then roll forward to current target season plus immediately previous season
global_policy.forward_capture_policy: from the first eligible match of a new target season onward, capture PIT market, lineup, injury and suspension evidence continuously

NED_Eredivisie.domain_note: regular league only; postseason playoffs remain excluded unless separately validated

SUI_SuperLeague.stage_note: pre-split and post-split groups must remain explicit

SCO_Premiership.stage_note: pre-split and top-six/bottom-six phases must remain explicit

JPN_J1.domain_note: 2026_special is a separate transition domain and must not be pooled into 2026/27 target-season strength

KOR_KLeague1.stage_note: rounds 1-33 and final rounds 34-38 remain explicitly labeled

ARG_Primera.stage_note: Apertura and Clausura plus zone/knockout phases must remain explicit

USA_MLS.stage_note: regular season and playoffs must remain separate

UEFA_ChampionsLeague.domain_note: main tournament evidence only for the formal domain; qualifying remains separate
